title: R2-C3
content:
{{Top|leg}} {{Droid |type=Rebel |image=[[File:R2-C3_CRO.png]] |name=R2-C3
"Seecubed" |homeworld= |birth= |death= |creator= |manufacturer=[[Industrial Automaton/Legends|Industrial Automation]]''[[Cracken's Rebel Operatives]]'' |line=[[R-series/Legends|R-series]] |model=[[R2-series astromech droid/Legends|R2-series astromech droid]] |class=[[Astromech droid/Legends|Astromech droid]] |cost= |length= |width= |height=1 [[Meter/Legends|meter]] |mass= |gender=[[Gender/Legends|Male]] programming |pronouns=new |sensor= |plating= |armament= |equipment= |affiliation=[[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]] }} '''R2-C3''' was an [[Astromech droid/Legends|astromech droid]] who was owned by the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]]. It was infiltrated into the [[Galactic Empire|Imperial]] [[Sector Plexus/Legends|Sector Plexus]] [[Space station/Legends|station]] near [[Keltos IV]]. Its duties as an Imperial droid were to monitor the Plexus' computer networks for illegal intrusion. As an Alliance operative, '''Seecubed''' (as he was known to the Alliance) recorded information from the Plexus' computers and transmitted important data to the Alliance. He originally was assigned to a [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighter]] but volunteered for espionage duty when his pilot was killed during ejection from the ship. ==Sources== *''[[Cracken's Rebel Operatives]]'' {{1stm}} ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{Interlang |de=R2-C3 }} [[Category:Droids of the Alliance to Restore the Republic]] [[Category:R2-series astromech droids]]
